theme_notes: Taglines draw from: the ongoing US-Iran war with ceasefire extended and Strait of Hormuz tensions (IEA's 'worst energy crisis the world has ever faced'); Spirit Airlines filing for bankruptcy a second time; the NBA playoffs opener featuring Wembanyama's 35-point debut and the Hawks shocking the Knicks at MSG; the Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael' premiering April 24; and MrBeast's wrongful-termination lawsuit.
settled: Even the US and Iran have a ceasefire. You two are embarrassingly stable.
Clean books. Spirit Airlines died for this accomplishment.
The MJ biopic has more unresolved drama than this balance. You're fine.
youOwe: Less than a Spirit Airlines bag fee. They went bankrupt. You just went cheap.
The Hawks won by more than this. You're still a villain at MSG.
You owe less than a barrel of oil during the worst energy crisis ever. Pay it.
Wembanyama's shoes cost more. He also plays better defense than you.
